name: fantasy-map-editor
description: A web-based fantasy map editor for world builders.

scripts.dev: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --parallel --filter @fantasy-map/api --filter @fantasy-map/web run dev
scripts.dev:api: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @fantasy-map/api run dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @fantasy-map/web run dev
scripts.test: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm -r --sort run test
scripts.test:integration: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @fantasy-map/api run test:integration
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm -r --sort run typecheck
